persona.name: Lina Müller
persona.lifestyle: Budget-conscious freelancer, adventure photographer, yoga instructor
persona.budget_range: Critical budget crisis (€185/month current, needs €295-315 for adequate coverage after €2000 Nepal disaster)
persona.travel_style: Solo adventure travel to remote locations, budget accommodations

Critical coverage gaps for high-risk solo adventure photography expeditions

budget_optimization.crisis_motivation: URGENT: €2000 Nepal emergency + mandatory compliance + upcoming expeditions require immediate coverage upgrade
budget_optimization.financial_reality: Freelancer income cannot sustain another medical emergency - must prioritize essential coverage
key_improvements: Adventure activities coverage to prevent claim denials (CRITICAL PRIORITY)
Lower deductibles to avoid €2000+ out-of-pocket disasters
Comprehensive equipment protection after €4200 damage experience
24/7 international medical support for solo high-risk travel
Professional liability compliance to maintain business licensing
